summary: Interactive Map feature testing completed. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified map page loads with OpenStreetMap tiles, markers display correctly, popup and side panel work on marker click, filters function properly, and location autocomplete in CreateAdPage works correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/judete - returns 200 with list of 42 Romanian counties
GET /api/judete - counties have required fields (code, name, lat, lng)
GET /api/localitati - returns 200 with list of localities
GET /api/localitati?judet_code=B - filters by București correctly
GET /api/localitati?judet_code=CJ - filters by Cluj correctly
GET /api/localitati - localities have required fields (name, judet_code, lat, lng)
GET /api/localitati?search=Bucur - search filter works
GET /api/localitati/autocomplete?q=Buc - returns 200
GET /api/localitati/autocomplete - includes judet_name and display fields
GET /api/localitati/autocomplete - display format is 'locality, county'
GET /api/localitati/autocomplete?q=B - short query returns empty list
GET /api/localitati/autocomplete?limit=5 - respects limit parameter
GET /api/ads - returns 200
GET /api/ads?has_location=true - filters ads with location data
GET /api/ads?judet_code=B - filters by București
GET /api/ads - response has proper structure (ads, total, page)
GET /api/ads - ads have valid coordinates within Romania bounds
Localitati reference valid judete codes
București has sectors as localities
MapPage - loads with data-testid='map-page'
MapPage - Leaflet map container renders
MapPage - OpenStreetMap tiles load
MapPage - 2 markers display on map (București and Cluj-Napoca)
MapPage - Legend displays with category colors
MapPage - Search input present (data-testid='map-search')
MapPage - Category filter dropdown works
MapPage - Județ filter dropdown works
MapPage - Marker click shows popup with ad details
MapPage - Marker click shows side panel with full ad info
MapPage - 'Vezi anunțul' link in popup works
Header - Map icon link visible (data-testid='map-link')
Header - Map icon navigates to /map page
CreateAdPage - Location search input present (data-testid='location-search')
CreateAdPage - Location autocomplete returns results when typing
CreateAdPage - Autocomplete shows locality with county info
CreateAdPage - Selecting autocomplete result populates Județ dropdown
CreateAdPage - Selecting autocomplete result populates Localitate dropdown
CreateAdPage - Green confirmation box shows selected location
frontend_verified: Map page renders with OpenStreetMap tiles centered on Romania
2 test ads with location data display as colored markers
Marker colors correspond to category (green for real_estate, blue for cars)
Popup shows ad image, title, price, location, and 'Vezi anunțul' link
Side panel shows detailed ad info with 'Vezi anunțul complet' button
Category filter dropdown populated with all categories
Județ filter dropdown populated with 42 counties
Filtering by category/județ updates map markers
Map zooms to selected county when filtering
Results count updates dynamically ('X anunțuri pe hartă')
Header map icon visible and navigates to /map
Cascading dropdowns (Județ -> Localitate) work via autocomplete selection
Location confirmation displays in green box after selection
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test ads with location data (București and Cluj-Napoca)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Interactive Map feature fully tested and working: 1) MapPage displays OpenStreetMap with markers for ads that have location data. 2) Marker click shows popup and side panel with ad details. 3) Category and Județ filters work correctly. 4) CreateAdPage location autocomplete search works - typing shows dropdown with localities and selecting populates both Județ and Localitate dropdowns. 5) Green confirmation box shows selected location. 6) Header has map icon that navigates to /map. 7) Backend has 42 counties (judete) and 368 localities (localitati) in MongoDB collections.
